description: Every AppMagic API operation as a typed command, plus the chart history, computed deltas, and entitlement awareness that no other AppMagic tool has.

novel_features.name: Retention benchmark
novel_features.description: See whether an app's retention curve is normal for its genre by comparing it against the cohort median of its tag.

novel_features.name: Chart diff
novel_features.description: See who entered, dropped, or moved in any top chart between two synced snapshots.

novel_features.name: Soft-launch radar
novel_features.description: Find newly detected soft-launch titles with first-seen dates per test market.

novel_features.name: Entitlements probe
novel_features.description: Discover exactly which AppMagic endpoint groups your contract includes, before a bare 403 surprises you.

novel_features.name: Competitor watchlist report
novel_features.description: Pull downloads, revenue, and retention for your saved competitor set in one side-by-side table.

novel_features.name: Tag rollup
novel_features.description: Aggregate market size (summed downloads or revenue) across one or more genre tags.

novel_features.name: ASO movers
novel_features.description: See which keywords an app gained, lost, or moved on between two dates.

novel_features.name: Live-ops overlay
novel_features.description: Correlate a competitor's live-ops events with their revenue and download movement.

novel_features.name: Web: monetization offers
novel_features.description: Browse AppMagic's in-game IAP offer library (structure, duration, pricing) from the web app's Monetization Intelligence module.

novel_features.name: Web: hourly top charts
novel_features.description: Intraday top-chart rankings with rank-change diffs from the web app surface.

novel_features.name: Web: live-ops tag counts
novel_features.description: Market-level counts of live-ops events grouped by tag for a store and country.

novel_features.name: Web: tag app counts
novel_features.description: Number of apps per taxonomy tag for market-niche sizing.
